plans.name: 118th Congress enacted districts
plans.description: Normalized baseline congressional district plan using the same 118th Congress geometry as the enacted outline layer.
caveats: This registry entry is a baseline enacted plan package, not an alternative proposal.
It proves the local plan-registry path before court, commission, and proposed maps are added.

plans.name: NC 2022 court-ordered congressional plan
plans.description: Congressional district plan ordered by the NC Courts on February 23, 2022 and used for the 2022 election.
caveats: This is an official plan file from the NCGA 2022 redistricting process, normalized for Honeycombing's plan registry.
It is a plan overlay only; election and demographic comparisons still need separate aggregation.

plans.name: NC 2023 enacted congressional plan
plans.description: Congressional district plan enacted as Session Law 2023-145 and used for North Carolina's 2024 congressional elections.
caveats: This is an official plan file from the NCGA 2023 redistricting process, normalized for Honeycombing's plan registry.

It provides a meaningfully different NC congressional-plan contrast against the 2022 court-ordered plan, but vote aggregation still uses centroid assignment until polygon apportionment is implemented.
